Class AbstractToolCallingAdvisorAutoRegistrationIT.ChainIterationCountingAdvisor

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.test.chat.client.advisor.AbstractToolCallingAdvisorAutoRegistrationIT.ChainIterationCountingAdvisor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Advisor, BaseAdvisor, CallAdvisor, StreamAdvisor, org.springframework.core.Ordered
Enclosing class:
AbstractToolCallingAdvisorAutoRegistrationIT
protected static class AbstractToolCallingAdvisorAutoRegistrationIT.ChainIterationCountingAdvisor extends Object implements BaseAdvisor
Counts how many times the advisor chain passes through this advisor. Positioned just after ToolCallingAdvisor (order = DEFAULT_ORDER + 100), it is invoked once per recursive tool-call iteration when the advisor manages the loop, and exactly once when the model handles tool calls internally.
Author:
Christian Tzolov
